name: io.github.sridharandevcom/telegram-mcp-ts
description: TypeScript-native, dual-mode (MTProto user account + Bot API) MCP server for Telegram.

environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_API_ID
environmentVariables.description: MTProto API ID from https://my.telegram.org (enables user-account tools).

environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_SESSION
environmentVariables.description: Reusable session string from `telegram-mcp-ts-auth login` (grants full account access).

environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bot API token from @BotFather (enables bot tools).
